summary: End-to-end verification of the new global inline editor (AutoEditWrapper), section reorder (ReorderableSection), store-card drag/edit/delete UI, and the StoreEditDialog 'Other' custom-category flow across all 6 listed pages — for both anonymous and admin roles. ALL critical functionality is working when the admin is in edit mode. Cross-cutting issues identified: edit-mode does not persist across hard navigations (must re-toggle Edit on every page), StoreCard / pencil / drag-grip have no data-testid attributes, /api/stores returns 502 stores instead of the expected 508, and many 404s for store-logo images flood the console.

minor.issue: Returns 502 stores (USA 254 / CAD 80 / EU 88 / UK 80) — request expected exactly 508. Mismatch of -6 vs canonical seed.
Many 404s in console while loading /store-list — store logo URLs in seed data 404. Did not block render but pollutes console + DevTools network.

ui_bugs.issue: Edit mode is NOT persisted across hard route navigations. After clicking 'Edit page' on /, navigating to /store-list resets edit mode (handles=0, editable-auto=0). Admin has to re-click Edit on every page they visit. Either persist in localStorage/cookie or sync with the existing refgd_session cookie.

No data-testid attributes anywhere — neither on the card root, the edit pencil (only title/aria-label='Edit store'), the trash button (aria-label='Delete store'), nor the drag grip (title='Drag to reorder'). Test instrumentation is broken; automated drag/edit flows have to fall back to title/aria-label which is fragile.

Search input + region/category radio toggles have no data-testid (e.g. 'store-search', 'store-region-USA'). Worked functionally — typing 'amazon' filtered to 1 article — but tests had to rely on placeholder selectors.
Toolbar root has no data-testid='editor-toolbar' nor are the Edit / Publish / Discard / Exit buttons individually testid-tagged. Tests fall back to button:has-text() which is locale-fragile.

design_issues.screen: Console (carried from iter 1+2 but still present)

verified_features.result: All 6 return HTTP 200. Anon users see ZERO admin UI: 0 reorder handles, 0 editable-auto nodes, no editor toolbar, no card pencils/grips. Confirmed both pre-login and post-logout (cookies cleared).

verified_features.feature: EditorToolbar visible to admin + Edit toggle works
verified_features.result: Floating toolbar (with All saved · Discard · Publish · Exit + click-any-text-to-edit hint) appears bottom-center in admin sessions. Clicking 'Edit page' enters edit mode (.edit-scope-active class set; data-editable-* attrs added).

verified_features.feature: AutoEditWrapper text + image decoration in edit mode
verified_features.result: On /store-list in edit mode: 148 [data-editable-id] + 146 [data-editable-auto] elements. Heading/paragraph elements become contenteditable with amber outline. Image popover wired up with URL input + 'Upload file…' (data URL) + Apply/Cancel.

Visible only to admin in edit mode. Confirmed counts: / -> 3 (hero, paths, telegram), /store-list -> 6 (service-intro, divider, storelist-hero, rules, payment-info, filter-grid), /evade-cancelations -> 5 (hero, intro, features, trust, pricing), /vouches -> 2 sections (hero, quotes — but reorder handles only render after Edit is toggled), /top-tier-methods -> 1 section (hero). All have data-testid='reorder-handle-{sectionId}'.

verified_features.feature: Store-card hover overlay (pencil + trash + drag grip)
verified_features.result: When admin + edit mode is active, the overlay is in DOM with all three children (pencil button[aria-label='Edit store'], trash button[aria-label='Delete store'], drag-grip span[title='Drag to reorder']) and the inner div has draggable='true'. Opacity is 0 by default and animates to 1 on real :hover (CSS group-hover). Programmatic mouse.move did not always trigger group-hover but real users will see it.
200 {ok:true, updated:2} for 2-store payload. Persisted sortOrder values.

Adding {name:'TEST_Toys'} returned 200 and the new category appears in extras: GET /api/categories returns {canned:[7 canned], extras:['TEST_Toys']}. Verified extras flow into StoreEditDialog category dropdown.
Selecting Category=Other in the Add Store dialog reveals data-testid='store-custom-category-input'. Custom name typed into this field is what gets saved.
200, total=502 (USA:254, CAD:80, EU:88, UK:80) — see backend_issues.minor for the 502-vs-508 mismatch.
Typing 'amazon' into the search input narrows from 254 USA articles to 1. Filter works for both anonymous and admin users.

action_items: [Edit mode persistence] Persist editMode flag (e.g. in localStorage scoped to refgd_session) so admins don't have to re-toggle Edit on every page.

[Seed canonical 508 stores] Investigate why /api/stores returns 502 instead of the expected 508; either the seed script under-seeded or the agent_to_agent_context_note count is stale. Verify the canonical store list and re-seed if needed.

[data-testid coverage on StoreCard / StoreFilters / EditorToolbar] Add testids: store-card-{id}, store-card-edit-{id}, store-card-delete-{id}, store-card-drag-{id}, store-search, store-region-{USA|CAD|EU|UK}, store-add-button, editor-toolbar, editor-toolbar-edit, editor-toolbar-publish, editor-toolbar-discard, editor-toolbar-exit. Helps both manual QA and the testing agent.
[Store-logo 404s] Audit seed image URLs that 404; either fix the URLs or fall back to a placeholder so the console isn't littered.
[Optional cleanup] Delete the 'TEST_Toys' admin category created during this test run — visible in /api/categories extras.
critical_code_review_comments: AutoEditWrapper.tsx: the runtime DOM walker pattern is clever but brittle — IDs include both a per-render counter (counter.n) and a short hash of current text. If a paragraph's text drifts (e.g. user edits then refreshes before publish), the id changes and the queued value is orphaned. Consider hashing the structural path (tagName chain + nth-of-type + section data-section-id) instead of free text.

ReorderableSection.tsx: dropOn() splices into savedOrder which may be a memo'd array; ensure setValue serializes the post-splice array (it does via JSON.stringify(next), good). However, savedOrder is recomputed from raw on every render — if multiple drops happen quickly the second one might race with the first un-flushed setValue. Consider using a ref for in-flight order state.

StoreFilters.tsx onDrop: optimistic local update is good, but if the POST fails the revert restores stores via setStores(snapshot) — but does NOT clear dragId.current consistently across early-returns above. dragId.current = null is set before the try, so this is fine. Ignore.
StoreCard.tsx: lacks data-testid on every interactive overlay element. For admin tooling pages this is a real gap.
Edit-mode persistence: EditContext likely stores editMode in React state only, lost on each route push. Persisting in localStorage with a refgd_session-scoped key would fix the navigation regression.
From iter 1/2 still standing: dedupe Three.js between @splinetool/runtime and GalaxyBackground via webpack alias, migrate THREE.Clock -> THREE.Timer.

success_rate.backend: 100% (admin login, session, stores, categories, reorder, add-category — all 200)
success_rate.frontend: ~92% — all critical flows confirmed; 1 medium UX issue (edit-mode not persisted across nav), 1 medium testability gap (no testids on StoreCard / overlay buttons / search)

test_credentials: admin / kaizokuoniwa (verified via POST /api/admin/login -> cookie refgd_session)
seed_data_creation: Created admin extra category 'TEST_Toys' via POST /api/admin/categories (visible in /api/categories.extras). Created 2 ephemeral sortOrder updates on the first 2 USA Electronics stores via POST /api/admin/stores/reorder (sortOrder=10,20). Both should be cleaned up before production cutover.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All MAJOR features in the iteration are functionally working. Use http://localhost:3000 directly. Login: POST /api/admin/login {username:'admin',password:'kaizokuoniwa'}. To enter edit mode on EACH page (because mode does not persist across hard navigations), click the 'Edit page' button in the bottom floating toolbar — once active, [data-editable-auto] count rises into the 100s and reorder handles render. data-testid coverage on StoreCard family is missing — use article[data-cursor='hover'] / button[aria-label='Edit store'] / button[aria-label='Delete store'] selectors as fallbacks. Cleanup: delete extras category 'TEST_Toys' and revert sortOrder if a clean state is needed.
rca of the issue: First navigation test misread edit-mode as broken because the EditContext reset on every route change. Re-running with a fresh per-page Edit-toggle proved the underlying decoration + reorder + drag pipeline all work. Root cause of the perceived breakage = editMode is held in React component state inside EditProvider and is not synced to localStorage/cookie, so every <Link> navigation rehydrates a fresh `editMode=false`. Mitigation: persist editMode (and optional pendingChanges queue) under window.localStorage keyed by the admin session id and rehydrate on EditProvider mount.
